name: Day Night Cycle
description: 24-hour environment cycle for Three.js scenes. Interpolates directional light, ambient light, fog, and clear color through keyframe-defined phases (dawn/day/dusk/night). Supports wall-clock time, timezone offset, fast-mode acceleration, and manual hour override for testing.

input.name: renderer
input.description: Three.js renderer object with scene, dirLight, ambientLight, renderer properties

input.name: deltaTime
input.description: Elapsed time in seconds (for update call)

author: Tiranyx
